name: Minecraft: Paper
author: ops@refx.example
description: High-performance Paper (Spigot fork) Minecraft Java Edition server. Great default for survival/SMP communities with plugin support.

installScript.script:
#!/bin/bash
set -euo pipefail
apt-get update && apt-get install -y curl jq
cd /mnt/server
UA='User-Agent: ReFx-Hosting'
VER="${MINECRAFT_VERSION}"
if [ "$VER" = "latest" ]; then VER=$(curl -fsSL https://launchermeta.mojang.com/mc/game/version_manifest_v2.json | jq -r '.latest.release'); fi
# Prefer the current PaperMC v3 (fill) API; the legacy v2 API is retired 2026-07-01.
DL=$(curl -fsSL -H "$UA" "https://fill.papermc.io/v3/projects/paper/versions/${VER}/builds/latest" 2>/dev/null | jq -r '.downloads."server:default".url // empty')
if [ -z "$DL" ]; then
  BUILD=$(curl -fsSL -H "$UA" "https://api.papermc.io/v2/projects/paper/versions/${VER}/builds" 2>/dev/null | jq -r '.builds[-1].build // empty')
  [ -n "$BUILD" ] && DL="https://api.papermc.io/v2/projects/paper/versions/${VER}/builds/${BUILD}/downloads/paper-${VER}-${BUILD}.jar"
fi
if [ -z "$DL" ]; then
  VER=$(curl -fsSL -H "$UA" https://fill.papermc.io/v3/projects/paper | jq -r '.versions | add | last // empty')
  [ -n "$VER" ] && DL=$(curl -fsSL -H "$UA" "https://fill.papermc.io/v3/projects/paper/versions/${VER}/builds/latest" 2>/dev/null | jq -r '.downloads."server:default".url // empty')
fi
[ -z "$DL" ] && { echo "No Paper build found for ${VER}" >&2; exit 1; }
curl -fsSL -H "$UA" -o "${SERVER_JARFILE}" "$DL"
if [ "${EULA}" = "true" ]; then echo 'eula=true' > eula.txt; fi
echo 'Install complete.'

variables.description: The name of the server jarfile to run the server with.
The version of Paper to install. Use 'latest' for the newest stable release.
Maximum Java heap size in megabytes (-Xmx).
You must accept the Mojang EULA to run a server.

longDescription: High-performance Paper server for survival and SMP communities — full plugin support, great TPS, and effortless multiplayer.
